notes:
Bug squash: Sonos names with emoji + duplicate-speaker entries.

(1) XML numeric character references now decoded in roomName + track metadata. Sonos firmware emits emoji as 🎵 (decimal) or 🎵 (hex) in zone names on some configurations — previously the dashboard showed the literal entity text instead of the emoji. unescape() now also returns proper UTF-8 byte sequences for any codepoint up to U+10FFFF, so 4-byte emoji round-trip correctly. The same decoder is applied to track titles/artists too (DIDL-Lite metadata path), so 'now playing' should also stop showing literal entity text for any track with special chars.

(2) Discovery now dedupes by zone name. A single physical Sonos can answer SSDP from multiple network interfaces (its proprietary Sonos-net mesh and the regular LAN), producing two distinct IPs for the same zone. Without dedupe the picker shows two indistinguishable entries — and selecting the wrong one can leave the board talking to the secondary IP that may not respond to SOAP on every network. First IP that gave us a usable roomName wins; subsequent matches by name (case-insensitive) are skipped.
